title: aster coerulescens var. laetevirens
intro: Aster coerulescens var. laetevirens, also known as the white wood aster, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of white wood aster include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease respiratory issues, and support the immune system. White wood aster can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for colds and flu.
